meta.siteDescription: A comprehensive digital knowledge hub for Hindu festivals, temples, deities, scriptures, and mantras. Explore the timeless wisdom of Sanatana Dharma.

home.subtitle: सनातन कोशम् — The Treasury of Sanatana Dharma
home.koshamDesc: SanatanKosham is a living digital library of Hindu knowledge — growing steadily with festivals, sacred sites, divine lore, mantras, and scripture.
home.quoteTranslation: May all beings be happy. May all be free from disease. — Brihadaranyaka Upanishad

festivals.title: Festivals
festivals.description: Discover the origins, rituals, and significance of major Hindu festivals throughout the sacred calendar.

temples.description: Explore sacred temples across India and the world — their history, architecture, and travel guidelines.

deities.description: Learn about the Hindu pantheon — the stories, symbolism, and worship of deva, devi, and divine forms.

mantras.description: Sacred Sanskrit mantras with transliteration, meaning, pronunciation, and audio playback.

scriptures.title: Scriptures
scriptures.description: The Vedas, Puranas, Upanishads, and Smritis — the timeless texts of Sanatana Dharma.

panchang.title: Panchang
panchang.description: Daily Hindu almanac — Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Choghadiya, and the Vikram Samvat calendar.

festivals.pageDescription: Explore major Hindu festivals — their origin, rituals, significance, and calendar dates.
festivals.heroSubtitle: The sacred calendar of Sanatana Dharma — festivals that connect us to the divine, to nature, and to each other through ritual, devotion, and celebration.

temples.pageDescription: Explore sacred temples across India and the world — their history, deity, architecture, and visitor information.
temples.heroSubtitle: Sacred abodes of the divine — where stone meets spirit and devotion transcends time.

deities.pageDescription: Learn about the Hindu pantheon — the stories, symbolism, and worship of deva, devi, and divine forms.
deities.heroSubtitle: The divine pantheon of Sanatana Dharma — each deity a facet of the one infinite consciousness.

mantras.pageDescription: Sacred Sanskrit mantras with transliteration, meaning, pronunciation, and audio playback.
mantras.heroSubtitle: The vibrational power of sacred sound — mantras that purify, protect, and illuminate the path to the divine.

scriptures.pageDescription: The Vedas, Puranas, Upanishads, and Smritis — the timeless texts of Sanatana Dharma.
scriptures.heroSubtitle: The eternal wisdom of Sanatana Dharma — sacred texts that have illumined seekers for millennia.

footer.tagline: सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः — May all beings be happy
footer.copyright: © {year} SanatanKosham.com — A digital preservation of Sanatana Dharma knowledge.
footer.builtWith: Built with devotion. Content is for educational and spiritual purposes.

panchang.pageDescription: Daily Hindu almanac with Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Vara, Vikram Samvat calendar, and Choghadiya.
panchang.heroSubtitle: The sacred almanac of Sanatana Dharma — auspicious times, lunar days, and the cosmic rhythm of time.
